description: Run XML transformations with Java (Saxon) or document conversions with Pandoc.
capability.untrusted: This extension executes local binaries and is disabled in untrusted workspaces.
command.runConfigured.title: Run Conversion (Configured Backend)
command.runJava.title: Run XSLT with Java
command.runPandoc.title: Run Conversion with Pandoc
config.title: XSLT Runner
config.backend.description: Default backend used by **Run Conversion (Configured Backend)**.
config.java.saxonJarPath.description: Path to a Saxon JAR (for example, saxon-he.jar). Required for Java XSLT runs.
config.java.stylesheetDirectory.descript: Directory containing XSLT stylesheets used for Java conversions.
config.java.extraArgs.description: Additional Java arguments appended after Saxon arguments.
config.pandoc.path.description: Path to the Pandoc executable. Leave empty to use an OS-specific default location.
config.pandoc.extraPathEntries.descripti: Additional PATH entries used when running Pandoc (for example, directories containing pdflatex).
config.pandoc.from.description: Pandoc input format (for example, markdown, docbook). Leave empty for auto-detect.
config.pandoc.to.description: Default Pandoc output format. The command validates the final target format against formats reported by Pandoc.
config.pandoc.extraArgs.description: Additional Pandoc arguments appended to the conversion command.
